chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD C.P. No.D-1731 of 2021 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 01.12.2021 Ms. Fareeda Naz Abbasi advocate for petitioner along with petitioner. Mr. Muhammad Saleem Hashmi Qureshi advocate for HMC along with Shams-u-Zaman, Accounts Officer HMC, and Rafique Khan, Legal Advisor HMC. Mr. Muhammad Ismail Bhutto, Addl. A.G Sindh. -.-.-. Vakalatnama of Mr. Muhammad Saleem Hashmi Qureshi advocate and statement of Accounts Officer HMC are taken on record. Shams-u-Zaman, Accounts Officer HMC, and Rafique Khan, Legal Advisor HMC, submit that petitioner is being paid monthly pension, however, his cheque of Rs.250,000/- towards encashment is pending before Audit Committee, whereas, his gratuity of Rs.907000/- is under process. They undertake that in three months they would start making such payments to the petitioner in four equal installments. In view of above, this petition stands disposed of. JUDG E JUDGE Ali Haider
